coolshirt: ^It's a collection of cool shirts with different animals on them.
coolshirt_convo: ^NICK: "Woah! This shirt's got little birds on it!"
^NICK: "Wish I had something like this in my closet."
^NICK: "My mom would say buying anything here is a waste of money."
^NOUR: "Do you have a lot of shirts?"
^NICK: "Um, I have a normal amount of shirts...?"
^NOUR: "Even one with, uh, a big wolf on it?"
^NOUR: He doesn't seem to like the wolf shirt as much as the bird one.
^NOUR: "Then it wouldn't be a waste of money, right?"
^NICK: "I guess. Maybe the wolf shirt would be better than the bird one."
^NICK: "That's the type of shirt that my friends like. Maybe my Mom could..."
^NOUR: "Wait, so you'd be willing to talk to your Mom about the shirt your friends like..."
^NICK: "Well, the wolf design is like... sick, or something."
^MS. SUWAN: "That was the most forced compliment I have ever heard."
^NICK: "Ugh... fine. I guess I liked the other one better."
^NICK: "But my friends make a big deal about what's cool and not cool."
^MS. SUWAN: "You'll feel much better if you let yourself enjoy things."
^MS. SUWAN: "You shouldn't care so much what other people think about you."
^MS. SUWAN: "I don't know about your friendships, but if you want a word of advice..."
^MS. SUWAN: "Consider reevaluating the people you keep around you."
^MS. SUWAN: "Can you be your true self around them? Do they really make you happy?"
^MS. SUWAN: "Or are you making excuses for them when they make you uncomfortable?"
^NOUR: "Yeah. If you feel like you have to hide things about yourself from your friends..."
^NICK: "... Maybe when I get outta here, I'll ask my Mom for a bird shirt after all."
